panels.title: Total RVs
panels.description: Total number of ReplicatedVolumes in the cluster.

panels.title: Unhealthy RVs
panels.description: RVs older than 5 min with IOReady=False. IOReady condition is not yet populated by the controller.

panels.title: Degraded RVRs
panels.description: Count of RVRs not in Healthy phase. Orange threshold at 1.

panels.title: Top-10 Slowest RVs in Range
panels.description: Top-10 RVs by slowest RVR creation duration among RVRs that first reached Healthy in the selected time range.

targets.expr: topk(10, max by (rv, storage_class) (sds_rvr_creation_duration_seconds{node=~"$node",storage_class=~"$storage_class"} and on(name, rv, node, storage_class) (sds_rvr_creation_completed_timestamp_seconds{node=~"$node",storage_class=~"$storage_class"} >= (${__from} / 1000)) and on(name, rv, node, storage_class) (sds_rvr_creation_completed_timestamp_seconds{node=~"$node",storage_class=~"$storage_class"} <= (${__to} / 1000))))

panels.title: Per-Node Resource Count
panels.description: Current number of RVRs and RVAs per node. Empty rows mean no objects matched the current filters.

panels.title: Slowest RVR per RV in Range
panels.description: Slowest RVR for each RV among RVRs that first reached Healthy in the selected time range. Use the RV filter to narrow the result.

targets.expr: topk(20, (sds_rvr_creation_duration_seconds{rv=~"$rv",node=~"$node",storage_class=~"$storage_class"} and on(name, rv, node, storage_class) (sds_rvr_creation_completed_timestamp_seconds{rv=~"$rv",node=~"$node",storage_class=~"$storage_class"} >= (${__from} / 1000)) and on(name, rv, node, storage_class) (sds_rvr_creation_completed_timestamp_seconds{rv=~"$rv",node=~"$node",storage_class=~"$storage_class"} <= (${__to} / 1000))) == on(rv) group_left max by (rv) (sds_rvr_creation_duration_seconds{rv=~"$rv",node=~"$node",storage_class=~"$storage_class"} and on(name, rv, node, storage_class) (sds_rvr_creation_completed_timestamp_seconds{rv=~"$rv",node=~"$node",storage_class=~"$storage_class"} >= (${__from} / 1000)) and on(name, rv, node, storage_class) (sds_rvr_creation_completed_timestamp_seconds{rv=~"$rv",node=~"$node",storage_class=~"$storage_class"} <= (${__to} / 1000))))

panels.title: RVR Ready Duration P50/P90/P99
panels.description: Time from RVR creation to first Healthy phase, aggregated over events in the selected range. Empty graph means no RVR completions in the selected range.

panels.title: RVR Phase Duration by Phase
panels.description: P90 duration spent in each RVR phase, aggregated from phase transitions observed in the selected range. Empty graph means no phase transitions in the selected range.

panels.title: Avg Creation Duration by Node in Range
panels.description: Average RVR creation duration per node for RVRs that first reached Healthy in the selected range. Empty graph means no completions in the selected range.

targets.expr: avg by (node) (sds_rvr_creation_duration_seconds{node=~"$node",storage_class=~"$storage_class"} and on(name, rv, node, storage_class) (sds_rvr_creation_completed_timestamp_seconds{node=~"$node",storage_class=~"$storage_class"} >= (${__from} / 1000)) and on(name, rv, node, storage_class) (sds_rvr_creation_completed_timestamp_seconds{node=~"$node",storage_class=~"$storage_class"} <= (${__to} / 1000)))

panels.title: Backing Volume Duration (LLV) P90
panels.description: Reflects LLV/LVMLogicalVolume provisioning time per node. Empty graph means no new backing volume readiness events in the selected range.

panels.title: Degraded Phase Frequency
panels.description: Rate of RVR transitions into Degraded phase in the selected range. Empty graph means no degraded transitions in the selected range.

panels.title: Per-RVR Detail in Range
panels.description: Per-object RVR creation duration for RVRs that first reached Healthy in the selected range. Use filters for drill-down investigation.

targets.expr: topk(100, sds_rvr_creation_duration_seconds{rv=~"$rv",node=~"$node",storage_class=~"$storage_class"} and on(name, rv, node, storage_class) (sds_rvr_creation_completed_timestamp_seconds{rv=~"$rv",node=~"$node",storage_class=~"$storage_class"} >= (${__from} / 1000)) and on(name, rv, node, storage_class) (sds_rvr_creation_completed_timestamp_seconds{rv=~"$rv",node=~"$node",storage_class=~"$storage_class"} <= (${__to} / 1000)))

panels.title: RVA Attach Duration P50/P90
panels.description: Time from RVA creation to Attached phase for events in the selected range. Empty graph means no RVA attachments in the selected range.

panels.title: Attached RVAs per Node
panels.description: Number of RVAs in Attached phase per node over time.

panels.title: DRBD Resource Configuration Time (P90)
panels.description: P90 DRBD resource configuration time for completion events in the selected range. Empty graph means no DRBDR configuration events in the selected range.

panels.title: DRBD Resource Deletion Time (P90)
panels.description: P90 DRBD resource deletion time for completion events in the selected range. Empty graph means no DRBDR deletion events in the selected range.

panels.title: Transition Rate by Type
panels.description: Completed datamesh transition rate by type in the selected range. Empty graph means no completed transitions in the selected range.

panels.title: Active Transitions
panels.description: Currently active datamesh transitions by type.

panels.title: Transition Duration P90 by Type
panels.description: P90 duration of completed datamesh transitions in the selected range. Empty graph means no completed transitions in the selected range.

panels.title: Step Duration P90
panels.description: P90 duration of completed datamesh steps in the selected range. Empty graph means no completed steps in the selected range.

panels.title: RV Deletion (P90)
panels.description: P90 RV deletion duration for deletions completed in the selected range. Empty graph means no RV deletions in the selected range.

panels.title: RVR Deletion (P90)
panels.description: P90 RVR deletion duration for deletions completed in the selected range. Empty graph means no RVR deletions in the selected range.

panels.title: RVA Detach (P90)
panels.description: P90 RVA detach duration for detach operations completed in the selected range. Empty graph means no RVA detaches in the selected range.

panels.title: DRBD Connections by State and Node
panels.description: Current DRBD connection counts grouped by node and state over time. Healthy steady state is Connected/UpToDate; non-healthy states highlight investigation targets.

panels.title: DRBD Unhealthy Connections
panels.description: Current DRBD connections not in Connected or UpToDate state. Empty table means all observed connections are healthy.

panels.title: Out of Sync Bytes
panels.description: Total out-of-sync bytes per node across all DRBD devices. Non-zero values indicate replication lag.

panels.title: RV Conditions
panels.description: IOReady/Quorum conditions are not yet populated by the controller.

panels.title: RVR Phase Distribution by Node
panels.description: Current count of RVRs in each phase per node. Empty table means no RVRs matched the current filters.

panels.title: Problems: Stuck RVRs
panels.description: Top-10 RVRs currently stuck in a non-Healthy phase longer than 5 minutes. Empty table means no stuck RVRs matched the current filters.
